name: Chicken with Ginger (Tahiti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 4 pieces.
2. Season and fry until the flesh turns white.
3. Sprinkle with flour, add the liquid from the crushed ginger, then add the wine and water to cover the chicken.
4. Bring to a boil and allow to simmer for 30 minutes.
5. Remove the chicken pieces and turn off the heat of the fire.
6. Strain the liquid, check the seasoning, and add the coconut milk.
7. Serve very hot with boiled white rice.
